  • Experience working on enterprise applications or digital platforms.

Education:

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

job_description:
Senior Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modelling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.
  • Translate business processes into functional logic that development teams can execute.
  • Decompose requirements into use-case flows, system behaviours, edge cases, alternate paths, validation rules, and dependencies.
  • Prepare high-quality documentation, including BRD, FRD, SRS, workflows, state diagrams, data-flow diagrams, API requirement specs, and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure all documentation is clear, logical, structured, testable, and ready for developers and QA to use.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding.
  • Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria.
  • Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately.
  • Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly.
  • Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development.
  • Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability.
  • Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking.
  • Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications.
  • Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity.
  • Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity.
  • Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams.
  • Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions.
  • Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions.
  • Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage.
  • Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs.
  • Not suitable for UI-only thinkers, passive communicators, template-based writers, or those relying on AI for answers.
  • Success is defined by clear, testable requirements, zero rework, strong cross-team alignment, and confident communication.
  • Candidates must align with 2Base’s structured thinking, clarity-driven culture, and transformation of the BA function.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field
  • 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst
  • Experience in SaaS or scalable product environments
  • Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems
  • Ability to run independent client workshops
  • Must have independently handled requirement ownership for at least one full project lifecycle

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior Business Analyst role focused on functional modeling, requirement clarity, and system-level analysis to drive aligned development. Requires 4+ years of experience in SaaS environments with strong collaboration and documentation skills.

Job Title: AI Transformation Leader - Immediate Requirement Closing Date: 03, Apr 2026 Published Date: 11, Mar 2026 Contact Email: hr.tvm@timesworld.com

Brief Description

The AI Transformation Leader is responsible for defining, driving, and scaling Artificial Intelligence initiatives across the organization. This senior leadership role bridges business vision, technology execution, and organizational change, working closely with executive leadership, clients, and cross-functional teams to embed AI into business strategy, products, platforms, and operations for measurable and sustainable value.

Key Responsibilities

  • AI Strategy & Transformation: Define and own the enterprise AI transformation strategy and roadmap; identify high-impact AI use cases and translate business objectives into scalable initiatives.
  • Execution & Delivery Leadership: Lead end-to-end AI programs, collaborate with product, engineering, QA, data, and business teams, and ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and aligned with standards.
  • Governance & Responsible AI: Establish governance, standards, and best practices; ensure ethical, compliant, and risk-managed AI use.
  • Client & Stakeholder Engagement: Act as a senior advisor in client-facing initiatives; shape AI-driven solutions through executive discussions.
  • Capability Building & Leadership: Build AI teams, mentor leaders, and drive an AI-first culture.
  • Measurement & Continuous Improvement: Define KPIs for AI success, track outcomes, and refine strategy based on results and trends.

Requirements

  • Education: Bachelor’s in Engineering, Computer Science, or related field (Master’s preferred).
  • Experience: 10+ years in technology leadership, digital transformation, or AI initiatives.
  • Skills: Proven leadership in large-scale AI programs; expertise in Generative AI/LLMs, intelligent automation, data platforms, and AI architectures.
  • Competencies: Strategic thinking, stakeholder management, communication, and change management.

Good to Have

  • Experience with AI Centers of Excellence (CoE).
  • Background in consulting or enterprise solution delivery.
  • Familiarity with cloud AI platforms and governance models.
  • Exposure to global organizations.
  • Knowledge of AI ethics, compliance, and risk frameworks.

Leadership Expectations

  • Drive AI transformation as a change leader.
  • Balance innovation with governance and business value.
  • Build sustainable AI capabilities.
  • Represent Timesworld in strategic AI discussions.

Application Link: Apply Here
summary: Lead AI transformation strategy, execution, and governance across business operations. Requires 10+ years in AI leadership with expertise in Generative AI, automation, and ethical frameworks.

Role Overview

We are seeking a Business Analyst - Prompt Engineering and AI to lead AI-driven innovation initiatives. This strategic role bridges business strategy, emerging AI technologies, and execution, ensuring ideas are technically feasible, financially viable, and aligned with organizational goals.

Key Responsibilities

  • AI Innovation & Feasibility:
  • Conduct feasibility and value analysis for AI products/features.
  • Evaluate AI readiness (data, models, risks, costs) and build vs. buy decisions.

  • Identify high-impact use cases for Generative AI, NLP, Computer Vision, and automation.

  • Business Case & Strategic Analysis:

  • Develop ROI-focused business cases with success metrics and risk assessments.
  • Validate innovation opportunities through market, competitor, and trend analysis.

  • Mitigate AI-specific risks (hallucinations, compliance, ethics, data privacy).

  • Requirement Discovery & Client Engagement:

  • Lead stakeholder workshops to translate business goals into AI use cases.
  • Own end-to-end requirement gathering and functional specifications.

  • Facilitate ideation sessions and validate requirements with clients.

  • Prompt Engineering & Solution Design:

  • Design, test, and refine prompts for generative AI systems.
  • Define AI behavior guidelines and collaborate with engineering teams.

  • Validate AI outputs for accuracy and alignment with business intent.

  • Delivery & Optimization:

  • Ensure AI solutions meet success metrics and support UAT/demos.

  • Manage requirement changes and drive continuous improvement.

  • Innovation Leadership:

  • Stay updated on emerging AI models (LLMs, SLMs) and propose innovation opportunities.
  • Mentor junior analysts and promote best practices.

Requirements

  • Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Computer Science, Information Systems, Economics, or related fields.
  • Experience: 5–7 years as a Business Analyst, Product Owner, or Solutions Analyst.
  • Skills:
  • Proven AI/ML or Generative AI project experience.
  • Strong understanding of AI development lifecycle (data readiness, model tuning, prompt engineering).
  • Hands-on prompt design and AI output validation.
  • Business case development, feasibility studies, and financial modeling.
  • Stakeholder management and communication with senior leadership.
  • Proficiency in MS Excel, PowerPoint, Jira, Confluence, Visio, Miro, SQL, Tableau, Power BI.

Good to Have: - Experience with LLMs, chatbots, or AI platforms (ChatGPT, Azure OpenAI, Google Gemini). - Familiarity with AI-assisted coding tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor). - Certifications: CBAP, PMI-PBA, CCBA. - Background in SaaS, digital platforms, media, or enterprise tech solutions.

Application

Apply via the link: https://www.timesworld.com/careers/business-analyst-prompt-engineering-and-ai
summary: Strategic Business Analyst role focused on AI innovation, feasibility, and prompt engineering. Requires 5–7 years of experience in AI/ML and business analysis to bridge technical and strategic goals.
